pr.title: Push Master Control Migration
pr.rollback: Revert PR to restore prior nav reminders behavior and account push CTA.

receipt.goal: PR1 revised: top-nav Reminders is a normal link to /family#reminders (not a toggle, no push on/off in nav). /account shows browser push status only + Manage reminders link. No DB reminder mutation from nav.
verification_steps: Signed-in nav shows Reminders as a normal clickable link (not a switch), no info icon
No nav-based push enable/disable or OneSignal switch state
